title: Graphics Engineer Interview Preparation
description: Provides a structured preparation curriculum for graphics engineering technical interviews: a problem set of 20 rendering fundamentals questions (with worked answers), a set of five system design problems modeled on real studio interview questions (design a shadow system for an open world, design a material system for a mobile title), and guidance on communicating trade-offs under time pressure. Graphics engineering interviews emphasize depth of understanding over breadth; interviewers probe from surface symptoms to root causes. Students will complete the problem set under timed conditions, participate in a mock interview with a GP mentor, receive written feedback, and produce a personal knowledge gap analysis.
